description: Nigerian age distribution — national figures. Per-state breakdown not retrieved.

national.notes: Under-15 and 65+ from Wikipedia 2026 estimate. 15-64 derived as remainder (100 - 51.7 - 3.3). Median age not stated in source.

electoral_relevance: Nigeria's youth bulge is electorally significant. The 18-35 cohort accounts for an estimated majority of registered voters. INEC's 2023 data showed ~40% of registered voters were under 35.

gaps.note: Per-state age distribution not retrieved. Source: NBS demographic reports or World Bank subnational data.
Median age not found in Wikipedia source. NBS or UN Population Division would have this.
Key forecasting metric. Not directly available from this source; needs NBS data.
